analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE (TCGA not in local data directory)
discrepancy_analysis:
A. DATA ATTEMPTED: TCGA MPNST external validation cohort (n=5) silhouette width from Supp Fig 1b.
B. AVAILABILITY: The TCGA MPNST external validation data are not present in the local data directory. Only the Toronto cohort appears to be deposited.
C. REPORTED VALUE: 0.98 (silhouette width for TCGA MPNST validation, n=5).
D. MODEL VALUE: Unable to compute — external validation data absent from the deposit.
E. ROOT CAUSE: The TCGA external validation cohort required to reproduce this figure panel is not included in the locally shared data. This is a missing-data handling issue rooted in the paper's data-sharing scope (external validation cohorts commonly sit behind TCGA/GDC controlled-access portals rather than being re-deposited with the primary paper).
F. DISCREPANCY MAGNITUDE: N/A — cannot compute a model value, so magnitude is undefined.
G. PROPOSED FIX: Obtain the TCGA MPNST methylation beta matrix (n=5) from the GDC/TCGA portal, project into the Toronto cohort's classifier space, and recompute silhouette width with the same distance metric and cluster labels used in Supp Fig 1b.
proposed_fix: Acquire the TCGA MPNST methylation data (n=5) from the GDC and project onto the Toronto-trained classes, then recompute silhouette width using the same distance metric/labels as Supp Fig 1b.
